CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2011 Continued To Feb-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion To Strike The X-Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven R. Disharoon, Esq., from Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendant and Cross-Complainant
Jy Lendormy, Esq., and Tarik J. Naber, Esq., from Luscutoff, Lendormy & Associates, 415-989-7500, for Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS GIOVANNA DE LUCA, SAVERIO ANDREOLI AND FRANCESCO DE LUCA'S Notice Of Motion To Strike The X-Complaint is Denied. The allegations of the cross-complaint do not pertain to the plaintiffs.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Undertaking Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1030;
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANTS ASN FOX PLAZA LLC AND BRCP 1390 MARKET, LLC, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS BROADREACH CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC'S Notice Of Motion And motion For Undertaking Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1030.
Denied. Defendants have not established that there is a reasonable possibility that they will obtain a judgment in their favor. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Undertaking Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1030;
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc And Motion To Strike Pltfs Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY SIDNEY LUSCUTOFF AND ATTY. TARIK NABER OF LUSCUTOFF, LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 989-7500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEVEN R. DISHAROON OF WOOD SMITH & BERMAN LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 356-8296 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS BRCP 1390 MARKET, LLC erroneously sued herein as BROADREACH CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC AND ASN FOX PLAZA LLC'S Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint IS Granted without leave to amend AS TO CLAIM OF WILLFUL FAILURE TO WARN BASED ON CIVIL CODE SECTION 846. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO BY STANDER CLAIM AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ANSWER TO BE FILED BY DECEMBER 19, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
